_publications._publicationTitle: Restoring functional neurofibromin by protein transduction.

_contextSnippet: NF1+/+ fibroblasts were transfected for 48 hours either with NF1 specific siRNAs or with control siRNA (Qiagen, Hilden; Supplementary Table 1) using the Lipofectamine RNAiMax transfection reagent
details: Used as transfection reagent for siRNA delivery in NF1 knockdown experiments
